title: Surgeries - Natalie Fleet MP | Bolsover
meta_description: I hold regular surgeries. At each session, I'll be available to help with local issues.
text_excerpt: Surgeries - Natalie Fleet MP | Bolsover 0207 219 5665 Email Me HOME ABOUT ME NEWS USEFUL LINKS HELP Contact Visit Parliament Event Request SURGERIES SURGERIES I hold face-to-face and online surgeries using Zoom/Microsoft Teams. At each session, I’ll be available to help with local issues. I hold both face-to-face and online advice surgeries, via Zoom/Microsoft Teams. Please get in touch with me by email to request a surgery appointment. I can help with various issues, such as education, environmental issues, antisocial behaviour, health and social services, highways, transport, and housing. I can also help constituents on other issues, such as council tax, bin collections, housing issues, social services, schools and roads and payments, tax and national insurance, benefits, pensions and immigration. 0207 219 5665 natalie.fleet.mp@parliament.uk Surgeries Newsletter First Name Last Name Phone/Mobile Your Address (inc.
